_INSTRUCTIONS: Copy this file to 'config.json' and fill in your details. The tool will read this file to customize content for your brand/niche.

brand._COMMENT: Your brand identity - what you want to be known
brand.name: Contai
brand.scarcity: Optional: e.g., '412/500 spots filled' or leave empty

niche.industry: e.g., Crypto Security, B2B SaaS, E-commerce, Fitness, etc.
niche.targetAudience: e.g., Crypto traders aged 18-35, Startup founders, Online shoppers

brandVoice.tone: e.g., Direct, educational, no-BS, friendly, professional
brandVoice.style: e.g., Like a friend warning you about danger, Like a trusted advisor

product._COMMENT: What you're promoting - features and pricing

terminology.problem: What you call the problem you solve
terminology.event: Industry events/news (e.g., rugpulls, data breaches, etc.)
